info.name: Hookdeck Issues API
info.description:
Track issues that occur on events, requests, and backpressure, and manage the triggers (rules) that open and route issues to Slack, Email, Teams, Discord, BetterUptime, and other channels.

Contact Support:
 Name: Hookdeck Support
 Email: info@hookdeck.com

request.description: This endpoint disables an issue trigger so it stops producing issues.
